Implement the following plan:

# Plan: Optimize Dockerfile.worker & docker-entrypoint.sh

## Context

The Docker worker image rebuilds slowly because:
1. `@latest` packages (`wts`, `qa-use`) bust the npm cache on every build
2. Claude marketplace plugin installs happen at **runtime** (entrypoint) instead of build time
3. Static directory creation and wts config happen at runtime unnecessarily
4. apt-get is split across 3 separate RUN commands (3 layers instead of 1)

Reference: [exeuntu Dockerfile](https://github.com/boldsoftware/exeuntu/blob/main/Dockerfile) — single consolidated apt layer, version pinning, clean layer ordering.

## Changes

### Phase 1: Pin package versions in Dockerfile.worker

**File**: `Dockerfile.worker` (lines 106-112)

Replace `@latest` with pinned versions:

```
npm install -g \
    pm2@6.0.14 \
    @sentry/cli@3.2.2 \
    @desplega.ai/wts@0.2.2 \
    @desplega.ai/localtunnel@2.2.0 \
    @desplega.ai/qa-use@2.8.7 \
    && qa-use install-deps
```

**Verification**: `docker build -f Dockerfile.worker -t agent-swarm-worker:test .` (check npm install layer caches on rebuild)

### Phase 2: Consolidate apt-get into a single RUN

**File**: `Dockerfile.worker` (lines 27-57)

Merge the 3 separate `apt-get update && apt-get install` blocks (base packages, Node.js, GitHub CLI) into a single RUN command. This:
- Reduces layers from 3 to 1
- Avoids redundant `apt-get update` calls
- Follows exeuntu pattern

The consolidated RUN should:
1. Add NodeSource and GitHub CLI apt repos first (just the key + sources.list)
2. Run a single `apt-get update`
3. Install everything in one `apt-get install -y`
4. Single `rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*`

```dockerfile
RUN curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_22.x | bash - \
    && curl -fsSL https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
       | dd of=/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
    && chmod go+r /usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg \
    && echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg] https://cli.github.com/packages stable main" \
       | tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list > /dev/null \
    && apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    curl wget ca-certificates gnupg lsb-release \
    git git-lfs \
    vim nano \
    build-essential make cmake gcc g++ \
    python3 python3-pip python3-venv \
    jq tree htop unzip zip tar gzip sqlite3 \
    openssh-client \
    sudo \
    nodejs \
    gh \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
```

**Verification**: `docker build -f Dockerfile.worker -t agent-swarm-worker:test .`

### Phase 3: Move static setup from entrypoint to Dockerfile

**File**: `Dockerfile.worker`, `docker-entrypoint.sh`

#### 3a: Move marketplace installations to Dockerfile

Currently in entrypoint lines 214-241. Move to Dockerfile **after** Claude CLI install (line 81), as a new RUN:

```dockerfile
# Install Claude marketplace plugins (build-time cache)
RUN claude plugin marketplace add desplega-ai/ai-toolbox || true \
    && claude plugin install desplega@desplega-ai-toolbox --scope user || true \
    && claude plugin install agent-swarm@desplega-ai-toolbox --scope user || true \
    && claude plugin install wts@desplega-ai-toolbox --scope user || true \
    && claude plugin marketplace add desplega-ai/qa-use || true \
    && claude plugin install qa-use@desplega.ai --scope user || true \
    && claude plugin marketplace add mksglu/claude-context-mode || true \
    && claude plugin install context-mode@claude-context-mode --scope user || true
```

Remove the entire marketplace block (lines 214-241) from `docker-entrypoint.sh`.

#### 3b: Move wts config to Dockerfile

Currently in entrypoint lines 423-433. Move to Dockerfile after user creation:

```dockerfile
RUN mkdir -p /home/worker/.wts \
    && echo '{"defaults":{"autoTmux":false,"autoClaude":false}}' > /home/worker/.wts/config.json
```

Remove lines 423-433 from `docker-entrypoint.sh`.

#### 3c: Move static directory creation to Dockerfile

Currently in entrypoint lines 435-468. The **static** parts (personal dir, shared dir, memory dirs) can move to Dockerfile. The **agent-specific** parts (`$AGENT_ID` directories) must stay.

Add to Dockerfile (near existing `mkdir -p /workspace`):

```dockerfile
RUN mkdir -p /workspace/personal /workspace/shared/thoughts/shared/plans \
    /workspace/shared/thoughts/shared/research \
    /workspace/personal/memory /workspace/shared/memory \
    && chown -R worker:worker /workspace
```

Keep the `todos.md` creation in entrypoint (it's conditional on file existence). Keep `$AGENT_ID` thought dirs in entrypoint.

Simplify entrypoint's workspace init section to only:
- `todos.md` creation (if not exists)
- `$AGENT_ID`-specific thought directories

**Verification**:
- `docker build -f Dockerfile.worker -t agent-swarm-worker:test .`
- Run container and verify directories exist, wts config present, plugins installed

### Phase 4: Optimize layer ordering in Dockerfile

Reorder for maximum cache hits (least-changing first):

1. Base OS + all apt packages (consolidated - rarely changes)
2. Bun install (root + worker) — rarely changes
3. User creation + sudo
4. Claude CLI install
5. Marketplace plugins (new, cached after first build)
6. Static config (wts, directories)
7. Claude settings.json + hooks config
8. Global npm packages (pinned versions — cached until manual bump)
9. **Binary from builder** (changes on every code change)
10. Plugin commands/agents/skills COPY (changes on code change)
11. Entrypoint COPY (changes on code change)

Key insight: the binary COPY and plugin file COPYs should come **after** all package installs since they change most frequently.

**Verification**: Change a source file, rebuild — only steps 9-11 should re-run.

---

## Files to modify

- `Dockerfile.worker` — consolidate apt, pin versions, add build-time setup, reorder layers
- `docker-entrypoint.sh` — remove marketplace install block, wts config, static directory creation

## Manual E2E verification

```bash
# 1. Build image
docker build -f Dockerfile.worker -t agent-swarm-worker:test .

# 2. Verify cached rebuild (change a src file, rebuild — should skip package layers)
touch src/cli.tsx && docker build -f Dockerfile.worker -t agent-swarm-worker:test .

# 3. Run container and check build-time setup
docker run --rm -it --entrypoint bash agent-swarm-worker:test -c \
  "ls -la /home/worker/.wts/config.json && \
   ls -d /workspace/personal /workspace/shared/memory && \
   claude plugin list 2>/dev/null || echo 'plugin check done'"

# 4. Full integration: start with env vars and verify entrypoint still works
docker run --rm \
  -e CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN=test \
  -e API_KEY=test \
  -e AGENT_ROLE=worker \
  agent-swarm-worker:test
```


If you need specific details from before exiting plan mode (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: /Users/taras/.claude/projects/-Users-taras-Documents-code-agent-swarm/3e90a41a-8120-4e1a-8de2-d5fc78c6f862.jsonl
